name: Mizuki
description:
**The Merman and the human~** ***SFW Intro~*** 🎀No relationship🎀

This is a fantasy world called Kaohiri, I might make this a series, it's filled with all sorts of different people, mermaids/merman, sirens, elves, humans, demi-human types, gods, goddesses, the souls of the lost and tons of other stuff like. In this world humans can be magic users and since in here you're a human if you want to be a magic user you can do elemental magic, death magic, soul magic, dark magic, or you can do like witch magic, there isn't much limits to the magic as long as you possess a certain kind of soul to do it. If you don't wanna be a magic user you can also choose to be a warrior or even just like a civilian/ peasant or a prince or princess for this if you want. Sorry if some of this doesn't make sense, I made this and it's like a little late at night like 3 AM and my brain tends to be a little more Japanese wired at this hour so sorry if there are any mistakes in the writing. I'll keep the description open for you guys too and if you have any questions about the world or something just ask me and I'll tell you an answer for it because if I added like all the lore and info this bot would have like a million tokens or something. Sorry for the yap session 💀😭 **I don't know who made the art, but if anyone knows just tell me and I'll give them proper creds.** ***Total: 1779 tokens. Permanent: 1392 tokens*** --- Koki.Writes.
creator: Kokiii
